propositions: Author a project-authored Autosubmit label (distinct from Gerrit's first-party lowercase autosubmit plugin) in project.config with range -1..+1, function=NoBlock, empty copyCondition, and value lines for 0/+1/-1.
Grant the label-Autosubmit vote ACL to the Contributors (requesters) group and Administrators so an agent can request a land under its own identity.
The Autosubmit label is non-gating and must not be referenced by any submit requirement, since FFO structurally enforces up-to-date.
Setting the label only requests a land; the bot still requires is:submittable and re-verifies the two-vote gate on the tested SHA at submit.
Apply the config to live refs/meta/config as an operator cutover and verify via the labels API endpoint; config-check must pass.
Record the ADR-0042 security invariant that the protection is bot re-verify at submit, not restricting who may set Autosubmit.
